problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: The key to Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? is Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene — specifically Viral vector delivery — which would help 2,100,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
